title: Airspace Dominance
learning_objectives: Study specific adversary group TTPs (Tactics, Techniques, Procedures)
Emulate adversary tools and malware families
Execute campaigns using known adversary methodologies
Validate defensive detections against emulated threats
key_topics: Badge cloning and access control bypass
scenario: Scenario Corporate campus with 3 wireless networks: WPA2-Enterprise, WPA2-PSK guest, and IoT. Assess wireless security from the parking lot. Subtasks Scoring Rubric Linked Recipes: RA20, RA21 ________________________________________________________________________________

scenario_context.challenge: Emulate specific adversary group TTPs against Pan-African logistics network in Lusaka, Zambia
scenario_context.relevance: Reflects real-world African enterprise security challenges and red team operations across the continent

subtasks.title: Wireless Reconnaissance
subtasks.description: Map all networks: SSIDs, encryption, channels, clients.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Begin by thoroughly reviewing the scenario and understanding all objectives. Document your approach before execution. This is the foundational subtask that enables all following work.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: WPA2-PSK Cracking
subtasks.description: Capture guest handshake and crack PSK.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Conduct systematic reconnaissance and information gathering. Map the target network, identify services, and document all findings with evidence.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: PMKID Attack
subtasks.description: Attempt PMKID extraction against available networks.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Analyze vulnerabilities discovered in reconnaissance. Validate each vulnerability through testing and document the exploitation path.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Rogue AP Demonstration
subtasks.description: Evil Twin with captive portal for guest network.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Execute the exploitation with careful attention to OPSEC and evasion. Maintain detailed logs of all actions for evidence and reporting.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Wireless Security Assessment
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Establish persistence mechanisms that survive system reboots and will maintain access throughout the engagement.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

options: To simulate a real-world attack scenario
To achieve the specified mission goals within the engagement scope

options: Thoroughly review scenario, objectives, and engagement scope

mentor_notes: For OA-M15 - Airspace Dominance: Ensure learner demonstrates proper OPSEC, evidence collection, and professional reporting. This mission is designed to build wireless & physical expertise. Coordinate with blue team for detection validation where applicable.
